## Analyzers (1)

### Valhalla_GetRuleMatches `v0.3.1`
Gets matching YARA rules for a given sample SHA256 hash

- **Author:** Florian Roth
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `hash`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Valhalla/Valhalla_GetMatches.json)
